commands: echo '--- 1. Restore /usr/bin/python3 symlink so dnf works ---'
echo '--- 2. Install playwright chromium deps via dnf ---'
sudo dnf install -y nspr nss nss-util alsa-lib atk at-spi2-atk cups-libs libdrm libXcomposite libXdamage libXrandr libxkbcommon mesa-libgbm pango libXtst libXScrnSaver 2>&1 | tail -15
ls /usr/lib64/libnspr4.so 2>/dev/null && echo 'libnspr4.so: FOUND' || echo 'libnspr4.so: STILL MISSING'
/usr/bin/python3.11 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; pw = sync_playwright().start(); b = pw.chromium.launch(headless=True); print('browser launched OK'); b.close(); pw.stop()"
